metadata.title: Coffee Intelligence Knowledge Base — Master Knowledge Graph
metadata.description: Complete topic graph, file relationships, learning dependency map, and cross-domain connections for all 83 KB files
metadata.format: XML knowledge graph for RAG, vector DB, and AI training use

file.title: History of Coffee
file.key_topics: Origins, waves, SCA, timeline

file.title: Specialty Coffee Movement
file.key_topics: Waves, SCA scoring, direct trade, quality standards

file.title: Coffee Supply Chain
file.key_topics: Farm to cup, actors, FIFO, processing overview

file.title: Certifications and Standards
file.key_topics: Fair Trade, Organic, RA, Q Grade, SCA Grade 1

file.title: Coffee Economics
file.key_topics: C-market, pricing tiers, producer economics, specialty premium

file.title: Sustainability and Climate Change
file.key_topics: CLR, climate adaptation, shade-grown, agroforestry, future scenarios

file.title: Sourcing and Direct Trade
file.key_topics: Importers, sample evaluation, contracts, farm visits, transparency pricing

file.title: Coffee Species Overview
file.key_topics: Arabica, Robusta, Liberica, Excelsa, varietals, terroir, altitude

file.title: Arabica — Complete Profile
file.key_topics: Genetics, varietals (Typica, Bourbon, Gesha, SL-28), roast guide

file.title: Robusta — Complete Profile
file.key_topics: Chemistry, blending role, Fine Robusta, Vietnamese coffee

file.title: Liberica — Profile
file.key_topics: Kapeng Barako, Philippines, flavor, history

file.title: Excelsa — Profile
file.key_topics: C. liberica var. dewevrei, taxonomy, blending, flavor

file.title: Ethiopia — Origin Profile
file.key_topics: Yirgacheffe, Sidama, Guji, Harrar, heirloom varietals

file.key_topics: Sul de Minas, Cerrado, natural/pulped natural, Catuai, Bourbon

file.title: Colombia — Origin Profile
file.key_topics: Huila, Nariño, Cauca, FNC, Castillo, Pink Bourbon

file.title: India — Origin Profile
file.key_topics: Coorg, Chikmagalur, Araku, Monsooned Malabar, S795

file.title: Extended Origins — Kenya, Guatemala, Indonesia, Panama, Rwanda, El Salvador
file.key_topics: SL-28, Gesha, wet-hulled, Bourbon, potato defect

file.title: African Origins — Rwanda, Burundi, Uganda, Tanzania
file.key_topics: Great Lakes, Bourbon, washing stations, potato defect, Fine Robusta

file.title: Central America and Mexico — Honduras, Costa Rica, Mexico
file.key_topics: SHG/HB grading, honey processing, Tarrazú, micro-mills, Chiapas

file.title: Green Coffee Grading and Storage
file.key_topics: SCA defect classification, moisture, density, screen size, sourcing

file.title: Coffee Processing Methods
file.key_topics: Washed, natural, honey, anaerobic, wet-hulled, fermentation science

file.title: Terroir Science
file.key_topics: Altitude, soil, climate, shade, microclimate, varietal interaction

file.title: Barista Workflow Science
file.key_topics: Cognitive load, movement economy, multi-order, ergonomics, speed

file.title: Espresso Extraction Theory
file.key_topics: EY, TDS, brew ratio, pressure, temperature, refractometry, SCA chart

file.title: Pressure and Flow Profiling
file.key_topics: Pre-infusion, declining pressure, turbo shots, Darcy's Law

file.title: Puck Preparation, Dialing In and Shot Diagnosis
file.key_topics: WDT, tamping, distribution, channeling, calibration

file.key_topics: Variable hierarchy, decision tree, grind drift, refractometer

file.title: Shot Diagnosis
file.key_topics: Under/over extraction, channeling, crema, flow anomalies, naked portafilter

file.title: Espresso Blending Theory
file.key_topics: Component roles, pre/post-blend roasting, seasonal consistency, trial matrix

file.title: Espresso Machine Technology
file.key_topics: Boiler types, pumps, PID, group heads, solenoid, flowmeter

file.title: Brewing Science Overview
file.key_topics: Immersion vs percolation, 6 variables, bloom, turbulence, SCA golden cup

file.title: Pour Over — V60, Chemex, Kalita
file.key_topics: All pour-over methods; recipes; troubleshooting; SCA golden cup

file.title: French Press
file.key_topics: Immersion science, Hoffman method, coarse grind, oils

file.title: AeroPress
file.key_topics: Standard, inverted, WAC recipes, filter types

file.title: Cold Brew
file.key_topics: Cold extraction science, concentrate, RTD, nitro, serving styles

file.title: Moka Pot
file.key_topics: Stovetop pressure, physics, critical rules, troubleshooting

file.title: Siphon (Vacuum Pot)
file.key_topics: Vacuum physics, technique, Japanese tradition, clarity

file.title: Batch Brewing
file.key_topics: SCA standards, freshness windows, café workflow, grinder setup

file.title: Milk Science
file.key_topics: Chemistry, proteins, fats, foam mechanics, temperature, plant milks

file.title: Steaming Technique
file.key_topics: Two-phase method, wand position, non-dairy adjustments, troubleshooting

file.title: Latte Art Patterns
file.key_topics: Heart, rosetta, tulip, swan, physics, competition WLAC

file.title: Extraction Chemistry
file.key_topics: Compound classes, CGAs, caffeine, acids, lipids, volatile aromatics

file.title: Maillard Reaction, Caramelization and Thermal Chemistry
file.key_topics: Maillard mechanism, Strecker, caramelization, pyrolysis, CGA transformation

file.title: Solubility Science
file.key_topics: Fick's Law, diffusion, particle size, bimodal distribution, concentration gradient

file.title: Thermal and Fluid Dynamics
file.key_topics: Heat transfer, Darcy's Law, Reynolds number, viscosity, crema physics, PID

file.title: CO2 Degassing and Freshness
file.key_topics: CO2 production, release kinetics, bloom, crema, staling chemistry, storage

file.title: Coffee and Health Science
file.key_topics: Caffeine, CGAs, antioxidants, health research, safe limits, decaf

file.title: Water Chemistry for Coffee
file.key_topics: SCA targets, Mg/Ca/HCO3/pH/Na, hardness, Henry's Law

file.title: Water Recipes and Remineralisation
file.key_topics: SCA benchmark, Aqua Magica, espresso profile, Third Wave Water

file.title: Filtration Systems
file.key_topics: Carbon, TAC, RO, BWT Bestmax, Everpure, ion exchange, descaling

file.title: Roasting Science
file.key_topics: Phases, Maillard, DTR, degassing, freshness, heat transfer, CO2

file.key_topics: Profile architecture, RoR management, turning points, DTR, Cropster, Artisan

file.title: Roast Defects
file.key_topics: Scorching, baked, underdeveloped, quakers, tipping, green grading

file.title: Roastery Operations
file.key_topics: Equipment, production planning, blend development, QC, packaging, economics

file.title: Roast Color and Agtron
file.key_topics: Agtron scale, SCA tiles, colorimeters, ground vs whole bean, measurement protocol

file.title: Cupping Protocol and Sensory Analysis
file.key_topics: Full SCA protocol, scorecard, 10 attributes, defects, specialty threshold

file.key_topics: All 9 categories, every descriptor, origin mapping, roast mapping, tasting notes

file.key_topics: Taste thresholds, acid identification, aroma kit, triangle tests, Q Grader prep

file.key_topics: La Marzocco, Nuova Simonelli, Breville, Rocket; boiler types; comparison

file.key_topics: Flat vs conical burr, EK43, Niche Zero, DF64, RDT, single-dose

file.key_topics: V60, Chemex, Kalita, kettles, scales, refractometers, filters

file.key_topics: Daily/weekly/monthly protocols, backflush, descaling, grinder care

file.key_topics: Boiler systems, pumps, PID, group heads, E61, solenoid, flowmeter

file.key_topics: Onboarding, competency assessments, progression, coaching, SBI feedback

file.key_topics: Brand identity, storytelling, social media, loyalty, community building

file.key_topics: All 22 modules, 6-month study programme, tools, resources

edge.relationship: Chemistry is the science of roasting
